release_notes: Warms the bundled Qwen2.5-7B writing model automatically in the background at startup.
Shows visible model-loading stages and progress so slower computers do not appear frozen.
Allows up to 600 seconds for the first response while the model is loading.
Returns to the normal 120-second stuck-request timeout after the model is ready.
Preserves Story Memory, profiles, settings, and writing files.
